messages.content:
Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.

A firmware update vulnerability exists in the fw_check.sh functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to arbitrary firmware update. An attacker can perform a man-in-the-middle attack to trigger this vulnerability.

The impact of this vulnerability could lead to unauthorized firmware changes, potentially resulting in loss of integrity (IOI), availability (DoS), and confidentiality (CWE-284). The MitM attack vector also suggests a significant risk of data interception (CWE-300).
